text: This is getting very long because it resumed our entire conversation history (1,200+ messages). Let me kill it and take a different approach — start a fresh session instead of continuing this one:

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input:
{"command": "# Kill everything
lsof -ti:9999 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null
# Kill any background claude processes
pkill -f "claude.*dangerously-skip" 2>/dev/null
sleep 2
echo "Killed"", "description": "Kill all processes"}
